ops.body: All shipped: synckit v0.22.0, cc-present v0.12.1 (daemon TLS + contract.md in 56148eb/40cf894; the SPA panel rode a concurrent session's 7c077b3 into v0.12.0). One criterion left open deliberately: the from-another-machine Chrome check. yBook-Pro runs 0.12.1 and serves https://yasyf.tail71af5d.ts.net:64195 (verified: LE cert, h2, SSE, browser DOM via QA lane — same-machine over the tailnet name). yasyf-home still runs 0.11.0: it needs `brew upgrade --cask cc-present` + a manual daemon stop/respawn there, after which its boards print https URLs and any second-machine browser open closes this criterion. Follow-up recorded separately: cc-interact ReadHeaderTimeout (slowloris), backlog task 88fc433.
